> useful, but broad operational scope and overlaps browser automation.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-browser --skill vercel-labs-agent-browser-all -y -g
```

**Use:** `/vercel-labs-agent-browser-all`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-browser --skill vercel-labs-agent-browser-all -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: useful, but broad operational scope and overlaps browser automation.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Vercel-labs agent-browser bundle; useful for browser automation/ops but broad operational scope and overlaps existing browser automation skills. Marked global-only-or-avoid to avoid duplication and uncontrolled surface.

## Install Prerequisites

status=global-only-or-avoid; selector=unresolved; note in Keep section. Do not bulk install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[vercel-labs/agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser)

## Comparable Alternatives

Specialized browser or automation skills if/when curated; general web interaction without broad bundle.

&gt; Web evidence from vercel-labs repos + config rationale. Evidence only.
